overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval harbor at sunset. The character walks along wooden docks, boards a sailing ship, navigates narrow cobblestone alleyways between timber buildings, and encounters armored guards, all bathed in dramatic golden hour lighting with the sun low on the horizon.

events.description: character boards the ship via wooden plank from dock

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the wooden dock holding a torch, approaching a large cargo ship

notable_agents.action: dock worker sitting near wooden barrels
child running across the dock planks

entered.detail: weathered wooden dock surface extending toward the horizon
tall stone tower silhouetted against the golden sunset sky
timber-framed harbor building with dark wooden beams
large wooden sailing vessel with tall masts docked at harbor
large wooden cargo crane for loading ships

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along the weathered wooden dock at sunset, passing harbor workers and a running child. The golden sun silhouettes a distant medieval tower while a large cargo ship waits ahead, dominated by a wooden crane structure.

events.description: stepped onto ship deck from dock plank
turning right to walk along ship railing

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking across the ship deck examining the surroundings and sailors at work

notable_agents.action: shirtless sailor scrubbing the deck with a brush
sailor leaning against ship railing looking at water

entered.detail: thick wooden mast with complex rope rigging
wooden boxes and barrels stacked on deck
large wooden steering wheel at ship's stern
thick nautical rope coiled on deck

segments.scene_description: On the ship deck, Geralt moves among working sailors, passing cargo crates and a large mast. The wooden planks creak underfoot as the character explores the vessel, with the harbor water visible beyond the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval alley between timber buildings

events.description: exited ship and entered narrow cobblestone street
moving into deep shadow between tall timber buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt leaving the ship and entering the narrow streets of the harbor town, passing under awnings

notable_agents.action: man sitting on stone steps near wooden building
child in green tunic walking toward camera

entered.detail: uneven cobblestone path between medieval buildings
half-timbered medieval house with white plaster and dark beams
simple wooden picket fence along building

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves from the open ship into the enclosed medieval town, walking on cobblestones between timber-framed buildings. The lighting shifts to shadow as the character approaches a stone archway, passing a seated man and a child.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley opening to dock via stone archway

events.description: passing through stone archway back to open dock area
emerging from shadow into bright golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the dark alley and emerging back into the sunset-lit harbor near market stalls

notable_agents.action: woman with broom sweeping near building entrance

entered.detail: wooden canopy frame for market vendors

segments.scene_description: Walking through the stone archway, Geralt transitions from the dark alley back to the harbor. The scene brightens dramatically to golden hour lighting, revealing a wooden market stall and scaffolding as the character approaches the dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock with guards and siege equipment

events.description: approaching group of armored guards near the water

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward a group of guards near the water's edge, torch held high

notable_agents.action: armored guard with spear facing Geralt
second guard in armor approaching from the side

entered.detail: calm water reflecting the golden sunset
medieval siege weapon with wooden frame on dock
tall ship with sails furled docked at harbor

segments.scene_description: Back on the open dock, Geralt approaches armored guards near the water's edge. A wooden catapult stands to the left while sailing ships are visible in the harbor, with the medieval city skyline silhouetted against the setting sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, sun-drenched expanse of a medieval harbor into the shadowed intimacy of a coastal town. It begins with Geralt walking along weathered wooden docks at sunset, passing harbor workers and a running child while a distant tower is silhouetted against the golden sun. As the camera moves forward, the scene transitions onto the deck of a large cargo ship, navigating past creaking planks, cargo crates, and a towering mast with the harbor water visible beyond the railing. The perspective then shifts from the open vessel into the enclosed town, where the bright sunlight gives way to deep shadows between timber-framed buildings. Finally, the camera follows the character across cobblestones and through a stone archway, passing a seated man and a child in the dimming light.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the shadows of a narrow alleyway into the expansive, sun-drenched openness of a medieval harbor. It begins as Geralt passes through a stone archway, where the lighting shifts dramatically from dimness to a brilliant golden hour glow. As the character emerges, the view opens up to reveal wooden market stalls and scaffolding lining the path toward the waterfront. The scene then expands onto the open docks, passing a wooden catapult and approaching armored guards stationed by the water's edge. Finally, the camera reveals sailing ships moored in the harbor with the city skyline silhouetted against the low, setting sun.
